raw_consumer_statement:
I booked a trip from XXXX XXXX Texas to XXXX XXXX Nevada through American Express Travel on or about XX/XX/2023. 

XXXX. ) I was immediately charged for the entire trip, even though it is XXXX MONTHS away. Usually you pay the hotel upon check out.

2. ) I booked an American Airlines ticket as well.

3. ) Due to surgery complications, I can not travel. 
XXXX. ) I called to cancel and was told it was not refundable. 
XXXX. ) I booked and paid with my AmEx, a similar XXXX trip last year, and was told the same 'non refundable ' policy. 
XXXX. ) Amex told me last year, " if you booked with Amex you wouldn't have this trouble. 
XXXX. ) This current trip, Amex uses XXXX as their subcontractor. 

I know, I'm getting a doctors verification, but what the XXXX is going on with Amex? 

Greedy advance payments? 

Lying to customers? 

This is not the AMEX I once knew and loved.
